Variables.Name: PSTemplate
Variables.Description: The particle system to use for this trail.

Variables.Name: FirstSocketName
Variables.Description: Name of the first socket defining this trail.

Variables.Name: SecondSocketName
Variables.Description: Name of the second socket defining this trail.

Variables.Name: WidthScaleCurve
Variables.Description: Name of the curve to drive the width scale.

Variables.Name: bRenderGeometry
Variables.Description: If true, render the trail geometry (this should typically be on)

Variables.Name: bRenderSpawnPoints
Variables.Description: If true, render stars at each spawned particle point along the trail

Variables.Name: bRenderTangents
Variables.Description: If true, render a line showing the tangent at each spawned particle point along the trail

Variables.Name: bRenderTessellation
Variables.Description: If true, render the tessellated path between spawned particles
